display_description.en: Guide users through filing and navigating Israeli small claims court (tvi'ot ktanot). Use when user asks about small claims procedures, filing a lawsuit for consumer disputes, landlord-tenant claims, service complaints, court forms, filing fees, or self-representation in Israeli courts. Covers claim limits (NIS 38,900), the filing process via gov.il, evidence preparation, hearing procedures, judgments, and enforcement through the execution office (Hotza'a LaPo'al). Do NOT use for criminal matters, family law, or claims exceeding the small claims limit.
